meaning: adj.不幸的,不快乐的,不适当的
examples: I hate to see you unhappy.
Ferguson was unhappy and it showed.
He was a shy, sometimes unhappy man.
Demonstrators in Nicosia were unhappy about the plans, but should the rest of Europe be happier?
Typical among unhappy customers is Diana Stever, owner of an eight-employee truck repair outfit in Duenweg, Mo.
